case_title: DANIEL L. BALSAM VS. PATELCO CREDIT UNION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($30.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALSAM, DANIEL L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY BALSAM, DANIEL L. AS TO DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
